rulings.Case Title: DON LEVISON VS. KEVIN BARNARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Answers And Production Of Documents In Response To Request For Production Of Documents And Things, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 11, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT TARYN BARNARD Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Answers And Production Of Documents In Response To Request For Production Of Documents And Things, And For Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED. Plaintiff shall personally serve discovery responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $800 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN TRIEU et al VS. DARYL J. DUSICH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 11, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT DARYL DUSICH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service. DENIED. Davidson v. Quinn (1982) 138 Cal.App.3d Supp. 9 is not binding on this Court. Allegation of receipt of the notice terminating tenancy is not an essential element of unlawful detainer action. See CACI 4302 element 6 accounting for split of authority. = (501/REQ)
